calendar.matters:
UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar May-30-2013 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-30-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Quidachay; Clerk: M. Olopernes; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic Inc. is present. Represented by Winifred Stadlman.
Attorney Margaret Dematteo for the plaintiff.
Defendant David Shaffrick is present.
Attorney Robert Gold appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Mark Schreiber, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of JUN-03-2013 is vacated. (501/JPT)

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar May-16-2013 Continued To Jun-03-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 501

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-16-2013 Continued To May-30-13 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: Judge A. James Robertson II; Clerk: M. Olopernes; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic, Inc. is present. Represented by Winifred Stadlman.
Attorney Margaret Dematteo for the plaintiff.
Defendant David Shaffrick is not present.

Judge Pro Tem Tom Lalane grants continuance of settlement conference to May 30, 2013 and trial date to June 3, 2013. (501/JPT)

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar May-09-2013 Continued To May-20-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 501

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-09-2013 Continued To May-16-13 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: Judge A. James Robertson II; Clerk: M. Olopernes; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic Inc. is present. Represented by Winifred Stadlman.
Attorney Marget Dematteo for the plaintiff.
Defendant David Schaffrick did not appear.

Settlement conference not held. JPT Ora Prochovnick granted continuance of settlement conference to May 16, 2013 and trial date to May 20, 2013. Plaintiff's counsel to notify the social worker of defendant re continuance. (501/JPT)
